name: demiplane
excerpt: Demiplane is an interactive collaborative whiteboard tool designed to be used as a lightweight virtual tabletop environment. Users can move tokens around, set a grid, and apply a background. Currently still in heavy development.
description:
Demiplane is a Dungeons & Dragons project featuring a TypeScript front-end and a C# backend. It utilizes webhooks to synchronize real-time movement between users on a customizable, interactive whiteboard map.

The goal of this project is to use it in tandem with lenny-dnd-bot to ensure a fully customized D&D experience.
